modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Duplicate files and slow user additions in Webadmit to Imagenow process.

full_description_text: Users are experiencing duplicate files coming in. This is affecting various users. Additionally, users are not being added quickly enough. Deadlines are not being met due to these delays.
short_description: Duplicate files and slow user additions in Webadmit to Imagenow process.
description: Users are experiencing duplicate files coming in. This is affecting various users. Additionally, users are not being added quickly enough. Deadlines are not being met due to these delays.
